intro: Straightforward pricing. You pay once to build the site, and then it is yours to own outright, with no subscription attached.

tiers.name: Static site
tiers.blurb: A fast, well-built website, ready to launch and yours to own.

tiers.name: Static site + DecapCMS

features: Edit your blog and portfolio in your browser

ownership: Every project comes with full ownership. The Git repository and the Netlify account are yours, there are no monthly fees, and once the site is built you owe me nothing further.
